findings.detail: Read docs/catalog/heartbeats/2026-05-20T23-06-00Z-atlas.json — gi=0.71 mode=yellow source=kv; 13 anomalies; seed_attempted=true seed_result="200 OK"; sustain_eligible=false; kv_keys present for core lanes (GI_STATE, SIGNAL_SNAPSHOT, MIC_*, VAULT_*, ECHO_*, TRIPWIRE_*).

GET /api/signals/micro 200 — composite≈0.666 errors=9; third-party stress aligns with ATLAS elevated set; ArXiv and NASA read nominal at instrument granularity (resolved vs catalog). Embedded micro cycle C-306 vs heartbeat/integrity C-317 (metadata drift).

GET /api/integrity-status 200 — source kv (not mock); global_integrity 0.83 mode=green terminal_status=nominal; degraded=true on payload despite quorum lane reporting degraded=false — operator should treat lane labels explicitly.
GET /api/epicon/candidates 200 — count 0; no candidates, verification skipped (no POST /api/zeus/verify or /api/epicon/publish).

POST /api/vault/attest HTTP 404 (Next.js not-found); quorum_status not returned. Supplemental GET /api/quorum/state 200 — state_machine.quorum_state=substrate_pending, vault_block_state=attested, integrity.source=kv-live, cycle=C-317.
POST /api/agents/journal HTTP 502 — ok=false error="ledger 400: No API base configured for terminal" mirrored_to_kv=false.

recommendation: Headline GI is lane-dependent: ATLAS catalog snapshot (0.71 yellow) disagrees with live integrity-status (0.83 green) and error-weighted micro composite (~0.666). Integrity source is KV (not mock), so KV seed is not the failure mode. Reconcile micro sweep cycle field (C-306) with CURRENT_CYCLE (C-317). Deploy or alias POST /api/vault/attest for C-298 quorum registration. Configure terminal ledger API base so agent journal writes succeed.
